nasb.text: There shall be one standard for you; it shall be for the stranger as well as the native, for I am the Lord your God.’ ”

esv.text: You shall have the same rule for the sojourner and for the native, for I am the Lord your God.”

cnv.text: 無論是寄居的或是本地人，你們都應一律對待，因為我是耶和華你們的　神。”

ccb.text: 不论是以色列人还是外族人，都要遵守这些律法。我是你们的上帝耶和华。”
